column1: #   cargo     Build a Cargo manifest with --release --locked. bins is comma-separated.

#   copy-bin  Copy an existing executable payload. source is the executable path, bins is the staged name.
# source and manifest are relative to FLEXNETOS_ROOT unless absolute.
